Game.Name: Jim Power - The Lost Dimension in 3D (USA)
Game.plot: Overview:Jim Power: The Lost Dimension in 3D is a sci-fi action game from French company Loriciels and is a sequel/remake to their earlier Jim Powers in Mutant Planet. Major updates were made to the game, including more gameplay modes and a graphical facelift. The game also makes ample use of parallax scrolling, creating a lot of visually intense stages.Loriciels developed the game in part to be an homage/spiritual successor to Factor 5's Turrican series. They even brought on the original composer for Turrican: Chris Hülsbeck.Jim Power: The Lost Dimension in 3D was developed for the SNES and PC-DOS. A Genesis version (called Jim Power: The Arcade Game) was planned but ultimately canceled.Cheat: Bonus CodesWhen you begin a game, find a place safe from enemy attacks and then press X, A, B, Y, A, B, Y, X, B, Y, X, A, Y, X, A and B on Controller 2. You should hear a tone. Now press these buttons on Controller 2 to get the respective bonus:
